ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter country code */,
  "iso_3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "num_code" INTEGER /* Numeric country code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the country for user interfaces */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the region */,
  "intermediate_region" TEXT /* Intermediate region level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with these indicators */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance of the country */,
  "fiscal_policy" TEXT /* Fiscal policy of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that uses this currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate against USD */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that speaks this language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language (e.g., EN, FR) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "native_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with this growth rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the growth rate */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate percentage */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population percentage */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being updated */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., independence, merger) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_status_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table that was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, OS) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation record */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language (e.g., EN, FR) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being translated */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being translated */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translated text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table with the issue */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing, incorrect) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
